mapper.select: SELECT * FROM kodik_calendar_state ORDER BY shikimori_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO kodik_calendar_state ( shikimori_id, next_episode, next_episode_at, episodes_aired, episodes_total, status, score, kind, aired_on, released_on, first_seen_at, last_seen_at ) VALUES ( #{state.shikimoriId}, #{state.nextEpisode}, #{state.nextEpisodeAt}, #{state.episodesAired}, #{state.episodesTotal}, #{state.status}, #{state.score}, #{state.kind}, #{state.airedOn}, #{state.releasedOn}, #{state.firstSeenAt}, #{state.lastSeenAt} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE next_episode = VALUES(next_episode), next_episode_at = VALUES(next_episode_at), episodes_aired = VALUES(episodes_aired), episodes_total = VALUES(episodes_total), status = VALUES(status), score = VALUES(score), kind = VALUES(kind), aired_on = VALUES(aired_on), released_on = VALUES(released_on), first_seen_at = COALESCE(first_seen_at, VALUES(first_seen_at)), last_seen_at = VALUES(last_seen_at)
